message:
bd-3uqg.3.8.1: native provider verification harness + baseline assertions

Add tests/provider_native_verify.rs with 7 canonical scenarios (simple_text,
unicode_text, tool_call_single, tool_call_multiple, error_auth_401,
error_bad_request_400, error_rate_limit_429) and provider-specific VCR fixture
generators for Vertex/Gemini SSE, Bedrock Converse JSON, Copilot two-step auth,
and GitLab non-streaming.

113 tests across 4 provider smoke modules (Vertex, Bedrock, Copilot, GitLab)
plus harness metadata validation. All passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://bedrock-runtime.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/model/anthropic.claude-3-haiku-20240307-v1:0/converse",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Accept",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {

+        "headers": [

+}

+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "verify_vertex_error_auth_401",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-10T17:12:54.856Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://us-central1-aiplatform.googleapis.com/v1/projects/verify-project/locations/us-central1/publishers/google/models/gemini-2.0-flash:streamGenerateContent",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Accept",
+            "text/event-stream"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Authorization",
+            "Bearer [REDACTED]"
+          ]
+        ]
